pages.text: Slime Milk is how you automate slime supply. Each resource has its own milk; a placed Slime Milk source block spawns that resource's slimes nearby on a timer, then drains after a set number of spawns.$(br2)Place a source by a frog pen and the frog keeps fed without you tossing slimes in by hand.

Milk is the per-resource link any tank or pipe mod can carry, because the variant lives on the fluid itself. A source pauses spawning when its area is already crowded, so it never floods your world.$(br2)Standing in normal Slime Milk is harmless - only boss milk is toxic (see Advanced).
